extDesc.message: Turn a screen recording with voice narration into a step-by-step Microsoft Word instruction document.

screenType.description: Screen recording type label on popup

tabType.description: Tab area recording type label on popup

customAreaRecordingDisabledTitle.description: Custom area recording disabled warning on popup for Chrome version older than 104

customAreaRecordingDisabledDescription.description: Custom area recording disabled warning description on popup for Chrome version older than 104

customAreaRecordingDisabledAction.description: Custom area recording disabled warning action on popup for Chrome version older than 104

permissionsModalTitle.description: Camera / microphone permissions warning modal title

permissionsModalDescription.message: Looks like InstructionsCrafter can’t access your camera or microphone. Make sure to allow access by clicking on the camera icon in the address bar.
permissionsModalDescription.description: Camera / microphone permissions warning modal description

permissionsModalDismiss.description: Camera / microphone permissions warning modal dismiss button

sitePermissionsBlockedTitle.message: This site doesn't allow camera or microphone access
sitePermissionsBlockedTitle.description: Modal title shown when the current page's Permissions-Policy header blocks browser extensions from using camera or microphone

sitePermissionsBlockedDescription.message: Looks like this website's security settings prevent browser extensions from using your camera or microphone on this page. To record with them, start a recording from another tab and switch back here once it begins.
sitePermissionsBlockedDescription.description: Modal description shown when the current page's Permissions-Policy header blocks browser extensions from using camera or microphone

opfsLoadErrorDescription.message: Looks like InstructionsCrafter couldn't load the recording from your device's storage. It may have been cleared or moved. If this keeps happening, please contact Andrew.
opfsLoadErrorDescription.description: Modal description shown when the editor cannot read the recording file from the device's storage

recordingWriterFailedToast.message: Recording stopped due to a storage issue. Your partial recording was saved.
recordingWriterFailedToast.description: Toast shown when the recording chunk writer fails mid-recording and the partial file is preserved

customAreaLabel.message: Set an area to record in

recordButtonNoCameraLabel.description: Record button label when in camera mode and no camera is selected

restartModalTitle.message: Are you sure you want to restart the recording?

restartModalDescription.message: Your current video progress will be lost.

discardModalTitle.message: Are you sure you want to discard the recording?

discardModalDescription.message: Your current video progress will be lost.

recorderSelectTitle.message: Choose what you want to record

recorderSelectProgressTitle.description: Title in recording page while recording

recorderSelectDescription.message: Keep this tab open. It will close once your recording has been saved.

sandboxEditorCancelButton.description: Cancel button in sandbox editor page

audioSilentToast.message: No audio detected. Check your mic, mute switch, or audio device.
audioSilentToast.description: Toast shown when the recorder has detected 30s of complete silence on the captured audio track. The recording continues — it's a heads-up, not an error.

restartFailedToast.message: Couldn't restart your recording. Try stopping and starting again.
restartFailedToast.description: Toast shown when the user clicks Restart but the BG handler couldn't reach or replace the recorder tab — previously left the popup stuck on 'restarting' silently.

shareModalSandboxTitle.message: Ready to level up your recordings?
shareModalSandboxTitle.description: Share modal title in sandbox editor page

shareModalSandboxDescription.message: Get cloud sharing, zooms, templates... And support a privacy-friendly tool made by a solo indie dev! ❤️
shareModalSandboxDescription.description: Share modal description in sandbox editor page

shareModalSandboxButton.description: Share modal email placeholder in sandbox editor page

shareModalSandboxLogin.message: Already have an account? Log in
shareModalSandboxLogin.description: Share modal login link in sandbox editor page

pausedRecordingToast.message: Recording paused. Press the play button to resume.

chromePermissionsModalTitle.message: InstructionsCrafter doesn't have permission to record your screen

chromePermissionsModalDescription.message: To enable screen recording, you must grant InstructionsCrafter permission to capture your screen when prompted.

micMutedModalDescription.message: To include audio in your recording, you'll need to unmute your microphone. Do you want to continue without audio?

countdownMessage.message: Relax. Click anywhere to stop the countdown.

updateAnnouncementTitle.description: Update announcement title for existing users

updateAnnouncementDescription.message: We’re introducing a new look and many exciting features, but don’t worry, it’s still the same free, private and open source extension you know and love.
updateAnnouncementDescription.description: Update announcement description for existing users

updateAnnouncementLearnMore.description: Update announcement learn more link for existing users

updateAnnouncementButton.description: Update announcement button for existing users

streamErrorModalDescription.message: Looks like something went wrong with the recording. Restart your browser and try again. If the issue persists, please contact Andrew.

getHelpButton.description: Side button on error modals that opens a prefilled support form

recordingTooShortToast.message: Recording was too short to save
recordingTooShortToast.description: Toast shown when a region recording is stopped by navigation but no chunks were saved

fastRecorderFailedTitle.description: Title for the modal shown when the fast MP4 recorder output could not be validated

fastRecorderFailedDescription.message:
The fast recorder output couldn't be validated on this device.
You can download the file anyway.
fastRecorderFailedDescription.description: Body text for the fast recorder failure modal

downloadAnywayButton.description: Button to download the recording file despite validation failure

memoryLimitDescription.message: Your device ran out of storage space, so the recording stopped automatically. Your recording up to that point is safe and you can download it from the editor. To record longer, try lowering the video quality or freeing up space on your device.

notEnoughSpaceDescription.message: InstructionsCrafter needs at least 1GB of free space to record. Please free up some space and try again.

troubleshootModalDescription.message: This will download a diagnostic report with system info and recent recording session data. Send it to Andrew to help troubleshoot your issue. No video or audio data is included.

audioWarningDescription.message: To record audio from this page, you need to switch to ‘$tab$’.

extensionNotSupportedDescription.message: InstructionsCrafter wasn't supported in your previous tab. You can still start your recording here and switch back to the tab, but your toolbar won't be visible.
extensionNotSupportedDescription.description: Extension not supported on tab description

backupsTitle.message: Set up a local backup for your InstructionsCrafter recordings

backupsDescription1.message: Keep a copy of all the recordings you make. If you don’t set up backups, your recordings will only be saved when you choose to download them.

backupsDescription2.message: You might need to create a new folder first if you're trying to save to Downloads or other system folders.

backupsOnTitle.message: Your recordings are being backed up locally

backupsOnDescription.message: To prevent being asked for permissions every time you record, we recommend leaving this tab open.

backupsConfirmTitle.message: Please reconfirm access to your local InstructionsCrafter backup folder

backupsConfirmDescription.message: We’re sorry, but we need your permission once more to keep backing up your recordings. Unfortunately we will need to ask every time this tab is closed, which can happen if you close the browser or restart your computer.

backupsConfirmAllow.message: Allow InstructionsCrafter to keep backing up recordings

backupPermissionFailTitle.message: Permission not granted to back up the recording

backupPermissionFailDescription.message: You didn't select a folder to backup your recordings. Depending on your browser version or operating system you might be asked to select the folder every time you start recording. You can try again, or disable backups entirely if you'd rather not give permissions repeatedly.

recordAudioWarningMacDescription.message: In macOS, you can only record Tab audio. Select the Chrome Tab option and make sure 'Also share tab audio' is enabled.

recordAudioWarningOtherDescription.message: Make sure to enable the option to 'Share system audio' if you want to record computer audio. If you don't see this option, try updating Chrome, or switch to Tab recording.

maxResolutionLabel.description: Max resolution label in settings menu

maxFPSLabel.description: Max FPS label in settings menu

resizeWindowLabel.description: Resize window label in settings menu

screenTooSmallTooltip.message: The screen is too small for this resolution
screenTooSmallTooltip.description: Screen too small tooltip in settings menu

maxResolutionTooltip.message: Cannot record at this resolution in your device
maxResolutionTooltip.description: Maxed out resolution tooltip in settings menu

reopenToolbarToast.message: Toolbar hidden. Re-enable it in the popup options.
reopenToolbarToast.description: Toast message explaining to reopen the toolbar in the popup options

loginButtonLabel.description: Login button label in popup settings menu

logoutButtonLabel.description: Logout button label in popup settings menu

loggedOutToastTitle.description: Toast message shown when the user logs out

storageLimitReachedTitle.description: Modal message shown when the storage limit is reached

storageLimitReachedDescription.message: You’ve used your full 100 GB of storage. Please delete old videos or scenes to continue recording.
storageLimitReachedDescription.description: Modal description shown when the storage limit is reached

manageStorageButtonLabel.description: Button label to manage storage in the popup settings menu

storageCheckFailTitle.description: Title shown when the storage check fails

storageCheckFailAuthDescription.message: There was a problem checking your storage. Please log in again and try recording.
storageCheckFailAuthDescription.description: Description shown when the storage check fails due to authentication

storageCheckFailDescription.message: We couldn’t verify your storage quota. Please try again in a few seconds or refresh the page.
storageCheckFailDescription.description: Description shown when the storage check fails

retryButtonLabel.description: Agnostic button label to try again

addedToMultiToast.description: Toast message shown when a scene is added to multi-recording

readyRecordSceneToast.message: Ready to record a new scene in your video
readyRecordSceneToast.description: Toast message shown when the user is in an existing project and ready to record a new scene

reachingRecordingLimitToast.message: Recording reaching 90 minute limit, it will stop soon
reachingRecordingLimitToast.description: Toast message shown when the recording is reaching the 90 minute limit

recordingLimitReachedToast.message: Recording stopped due to 90 minute limit
recordingLimitReachedToast.description: Toast message shown when the recording limit is reached

tabRecordingDisabledToast.message: Tab recording is disabled on this page. Defaulted to screen recording.
tabRecordingDisabledToast.description: Toast message shown when tab recording is disabled on a page

projectRecordingCancelledToast.description: Toast message shown when the user cancels project recording

copiedToClipboardToast.description: Toast message shown when link has been copied to clipboard

failedToCopyToClipboardToast.description: Toast message shown when failed to copy link to clipboard

newestSortLabel.description: Label for the newest sort option

oldestSortLabel.description: Label for the oldest sort option

allVideosHeading.description: Heading for the all videos section in the popup

noVideosFound.description: Message shown when no videos are found in the popup

loadingVideosLabel.description: Label shown when videos are loading in the popup

goToDashboardButtonLabel.description: Button label to go to the dashboard in the popup

welcomePopupSupport.description: Message for supporting the indie maker in the welcome popup

accountSettingsOption.description: Label for the account settings option in the popup

supportSettingsOption.description: Label for the support option in the popup

inactiveSubscriptionTitle.description: Title shown when the user's subscription is inactive

inactiveSubscriptionDescription.message: Your InstructionsCrafter Pro subscription is inactive.
inactiveSubscriptionDescription.description: Description shown when the user's subscription is inactive

inactiveSubscriptionReactivation.description: Message prompting the user to reactivate their subscription

inactiveSubscriptionDeletionWarning.message: Your videos and data will be permanently deleted on
inactiveSubscriptionDeletionWarning.description: Warning message about the deletion of videos and data

loggedOutDescription.message: To keep your recordings synced to your account, and access premium features, you’ll need to log back in.
loggedOutDescription.description: Description shown when the user is logged out

logBackInButton.description: Button to log back in after being logged out

loggedOutFreeVersion.message: You can keep using the extension without an account - but your recordings won’t be saved and can’t be recovered later.
loggedOutFreeVersion.description: Message shown when the user is logged out and using the free version

continueWithoutLogin.description: Button to continue using the extension without logging in

instantRecordingModeLabel.description: Label for the instant recording mode

instantRecordingModeTooltip.message: Instant download, but camera and layout won’t be editable later.
instantRecordingModeTooltip.description: Tooltip for the instant recording mode

instantRecordingModeTitle.description: Title for the instant recording mode

instantRecordingModeDescription.message: This records everything into one video for instant download and sharing. You won’t be able to change the camera layout afterward, but other edits are still possible.
instantRecordingModeDescription.description: Description for the instant recording mode

instantRecordingModeAction.description: Action button for the instant recording mode

tabRecordingDisabledTooltip.message: Tab recording is disabled on this page
tabRecordingDisabledTooltip.description: Tooltip shown when tab recording is disabled on a page

addingToLabel.description: Label shown when a scene is being recorded to a project

finishLabelMulti.description: Label for the finish multi-recording button

welcomeProTitle.message: Want to do more with your recordings?
welcomeProTitle.description: Title for the welcome Pro popup

welcomeProDescription.message: Sign in to save your videos to the cloud, share with a link, and access advanced editing features.
welcomeProDescription.description: Description for the welcome Pro popup

welcomeProButton.message: Sign in to unlock paid features

welcomeProSupport.message: Support development by a solo indie maker
welcomeProSupport.description: Message for supporting the indie maker in the welcome Pro popup

multiRecordingModeTitle.description: Title for the multi-recording mode modal

multiRecordingModeDescription.message: Record multiple scenes, like your screen, camera, or both, one after another. This is great for doing multiple takes, switching views, or breaking your recording into parts. When you’re done, click Finish to open the editor with all your scenes combined in one project.
multiRecordingModeDescription.description: Description for the multi-recording mode modal

noSubscriptionYetTitle.description: Title shown when the user has no active subscription

noSubscriptionYetDescription.message: Please subscribe to access Pro features.
noSubscriptionYetDescription.description: Message prompting the user to subscribe to reactivate their Pro features

welcomeBackPopupTitle.description: Title for the welcome back popup shown to returning users

welcomeBackProTitle.message: ✨ New: Need more than just recording?
welcomeBackProTitle.description: Title for the cloud storage feature in the welcome back popup

welcomeBackProDescription.message: InstructionsCrafter Pro is an optional new platform for saving videos to the cloud, sharing with a link, and unlocking advanced editing tools, if and when you need them.
welcomeBackProDescription.description: Description for the cloud storage feature in the welcome back popup

welcomeBackProCTA.description: Call to action button for the cloud storage feature in the welcome back popup

resetOnboardingOption.description: Reset pro onboarding option label in popup settings menu

recoverLastRecordingOption.description: Settings menu item to manually trigger cloud recording recovery

toastStorageCritical.message: Low disk space. Saving your recording now. Everything captured so far is safe.
toastStorageCritical.description: Toast when disk space drops below critical threshold during recording

recordingFailedModalTitle.description: Title of the modal shown when recording fails to start

recordingFailedModalDescription.message: Something prevented the recording from starting. Please try again. If this keeps happening, contact Andrew.
recordingFailedModalDescription.description: Description of the modal shown when recording fails to start

toastStorageLow.message: Storage is running low. Upload reliability may degrade for long recordings.
toastStorageLow.description: Toast shown when available storage drops below the warning threshold during recording

streamEndedWarningToast.message: Screen sharing stopped. Your recording so far is saved. Stop when you're ready.
streamEndedWarningToast.description: Toast shown when screen share track ends mid-recording. Recording continues; removes false urgency about data loss.

videoTrackEndedToast.message: Screen sharing stopped. Saving your recording now. Everything captured so far is safe.
videoTrackEndedToast.description: Toast shown when the video track ends mid-recording (e.g. monitor disconnected, screen share revoked)

audioTrackEndedToast.message: Audio disconnected. Saving your recording now. The video captured so far is safe.
audioTrackEndedToast.description: Toast shown when the audio track ends mid-recording (e.g. mic unplugged, permission revoked)

editorRecoveryToast.message: Your recording is saved. The editor didn't open. Click the InstructionsCrafter icon to try again.
editorRecoveryToast.description: Toast shown on the active tab when the post-recording editor tab fails to open

stopAckTimeoutToast.message: Saving is taking longer than expected. Your captured data is safe. The editor will open shortly.
stopAckTimeoutToast.description: Toast shown when the recorder does not acknowledge the stop request within a few seconds

cameraUnavailableToast.message: Camera disconnected. Still recording your screen.
cameraUnavailableToast.description: Toast shown when the camera bubble fails during an active recording but the screen recording continues
